title: The Workshop
author: Zachary Proser
description: A complete working drawing for an AI training workshop: how to design, build, deliver, and follow through on an AI workshop for engineers or corporate AI training that works.

blueprint.subject: AI ENABLEMENT
blueprint.subtitle: A useful workshop leaves the room with working capability, durable artifacts, and a clear next move.
rfiSuggestions: What does a workshop engagement cost?
How do you handle a room with mixed skill levels?
What artifacts does my team keep?
